flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Middle Georgia State University rose 44% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.4k → $16.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Middle Georgia State University rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.0k → $5.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Middle Georgia State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Middle Georgia State University rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (10.2% → 12.4%).
